Name: Data layer
Goal: Django project scaffold plus the full designed schema: models split across the four apps, migrations, admin, seeded motif taxonomy, constants module, and the two pure utility modules (eval conversion, position_key) everything downstream leans on.
Exit Criteria: Migrations apply cleanly on SQLite; admin CRUD works for every model; MotifTag seeded (13 + OTHER); eval-conversion and position_key unit tests green; ruff and pytest clean.

Name: Ingest
Goal: chess.com archives → Game rows, idempotently, with PipelineRun visibility.
Exit Criteria: Full personal history ingests; running ingest twice changes nothing; current month re-fetches while earlier months are cached; games without %clk ingest without error.

Name: Analyze
Goal: The heart of the app: two-phase engine pass, AVOID/PUNISH candidate detection, five gates with Candidate persistence, puzzle/occurrence creation under the collision policy, SEE, and all Tier-1 motif detectors, wired into an idempotent analyze command.
Exit Criteria: analyze processes PENDING games in per-game transactions and yields ~1–3 puzzles/game on a sample; every gate decision leaves a Candidate row; table-driven gate tests and fixture-based detector tests green; re-running analyze is a no-op; --retry-failed and --reanalyze work.

Name: Calibration
Goal: The checkpoint: dump 50 random surviving puzzles to a static page, eyeball them, tune constants. Nothing downstream starts until puzzles feel fair.
Exit Criteria: Full-history backfill analyzed; calibration page reviewed; constants tuned with observations recorded in Design.md §10; explicit go decision recorded.

Name: Training
Goal: The solve loop: SM-2 pure module, serving endpoints, chessground widget, stateless multi-move validation, grading, fail screen, bury/report.
Exit Criteria: A puzzle can be served, solved or failed end-to-end in the browser; SM-2 scheduling verified by unit tests plus a manual multi-day check; hints priced into grade; near-misses logged on Attempt rows; app is behind login.

Name: Dashboards
Goal: snapshot command plus the four read pages: dashboard (with the games-vs-training gap), openings leak table, puzzle archive, pipeline health.
Exit Criteria: snapshot is delete-and-recompute idempotent; all four pages render from real data; the motif table shows both games-side and training-side rates.

Name: LLM tagging
Goal: The optional enrichment stage: batched LLM tag proposals, schema validation, board verification, explanations, tag command, run_pipeline wrapper.
Exit Criteria: tag proposes/verifies/stores Tier-2 tags with provenance; contradicted tags dropped; three-strikes skip works; app remains fully functional with tagging disabled; run_pipeline chains ingest→analyze→tag.

Name: Deploy & ops
Goal: Lightsail deployment, cron wiring with separate locks and nice/ionice, healthchecks pings, production backfill.
Exit Criteria: App live behind login; both cron jobs running with per-job locks and pings; healthchecks dashboard green for a week; prod backfill complete.
Depends On: M5 (M7 for the tag stage in cron)
